title: galium trifidum subsp. columbianum
intro: Galium trifidum subsp. columbianum, also known as Columbia bedstraw, is a subspecies of the Galium trifidum plant, which is a flowering plant in the bedstraw family. It is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds that exhibit medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Columbia bedstraw include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Columbia bedstraw is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
